description: MicroHire AV products across Master Warehouse (Brisbane Main) and subwarehouses (Sydney WH2, Melbourne WH3). All products registered in RentalPoint.

categories.name: Audio Equipment
categories.description: Audio equipment ensures clarity of speech, balanced music playback, and immersive sound coverage across event spaces. MicroHire maintains professional-grade solutions for all scales, from small rooms to concert halls.
equipmentTypes: PA Systems – Portable sound systems suitable for small gatherings
Speakers (Line Array & Point Source) – For medium to large-scale venues
Microphones (Wired, Wireless, Lapel, Handheld, Headset) – Ideal for speeches, panels, and performances
Mixing Consoles – For balancing multiple audio sources
Audio Accessories – DI boxes, audio recorders, and signal processors

eventRecommendations.recommendation: 1–2 wireless handheld or lapel mics, compact speaker system
Wireless microphone kits (lapel for presenters, handheld for Q&A), distributed speakers, digital mixing console
Line array speakers, subwoofers, stage monitors, multiple mics
Portable PA with wireless mic for facilitator

categories.integrationAndScalability: Audio setups integrate with video systems for seamless live streams and hybrid meetings. Scalable by linking additional speakers and microphones.
categories.operationalNotes: MicroHire technicians provide on-site calibration. Backup microphones always available. Rehearsal sound check recommended.
categories.operationGuidance: Basic speech events can be self-operated after setup, but an audio technician is recommended for microphone mixing, troubleshooting, and smooth transitions.

availabilitySeasons.peak: Oct–Dec – High demand for large PA systems (gala dinners, Christmas events)

categories.name: Visual Equipment
categories.description: Visual solutions deliver crisp, engaging content through screens, projectors, and LED walls.

eventRecommendations.recommendation: LED video wall for dramatic impact

categories.integrationAndScalability: Seamless integration with audio and lighting for hybrid or fully immersive events. LED walls scalable in size.
categories.operationalNotes: MicroHire provides test pattern setup and resolution scaling. Backup displays recommended for large expos. Projectors need controlled lighting conditions.
categories.operationGuidance: Single-projector presentations may be self-operated after setup, but operator support is recommended for multiple sources, switching, live cameras, or recording.

availabilitySeasons.peak: LED walls and large projectors in very high demand

categories.name: Lighting Equipment
categories.description: Lighting transforms spaces, highlights speakers, and sets the event atmosphere.

eventRecommendations.recommendation: Uplighting, moving heads for dynamic effects
Intelligent moving heads for dramatic reveals

categories.integrationAndScalability: Lighting integrates with sound cues and video content for synchronised shows.
categories.operationalNotes: Rigging may be required. Safety compliance with weight loadings is essential. Pre-programming for cue-based events.
categories.operationGuidance: Lighting systems require a trained operator due to rigging, programming, and safety requirements.

categories.name: Staging & Structures
categories.description: Customisable staging and event structures provide physical platforms for presentations, performances, and exhibitions.
categories.integrationAndScalability: Compatible with MicroHire's lighting and AV setups.
categories.operationalNotes: Engineering certification provided for truss builds. On-site safety checks performed by crew.
categories.operationGuidance: Staging and structural systems require trained crew for compliant installation, safety checks, and changes during the event.

availabilitySeasons.high: High demand during exhibition season (Feb–May, Aug–Oct)

categories.name: Event Technology Solutions
categories.description: Interactive and tech-driven solutions that enhance engagement and hybrid experiences.
categories.integrationAndScalability: All systems integrate with MicroHire's audio, video, and lighting setups.
categories.operationalNotes: MicroHire provides tech moderation for hybrid events. Connectivity checks required pre-event.
categories.operationGuidance: Simple interfaces can be self-operated after setup, but operator support is recommended for hybrid moderation, conferencing, or multi-system workflows.

availabilitySeasons.peak: COVID-style hybrid events – High demand for streaming kits

categories.name: Computers & Playback Systems
categories.description: Dedicated devices for content management, media playback, and seamless switching.
equipmentTypes: Laptops (PC/Mac) – Preloaded with Microsoft Office and presentation software
Media Servers – For high-end graphics, mapping, and video playback
Playback Devices (DVD/Blu-Ray, Digital Players) – For pre-recorded content
Clickers & Presentation Remotes – Wireless slide advancement for presenters

eventRecommendations.recommendation: Conferences, workshops, awards nights, hybrid events

categories.integrationAndScalability: Integrates with projectors, screens, and video systems for full presentation workflows.
categories.operationalNotes: Laptops provided with standard software; media servers for high-end playback. Presentation remotes for wireless control.
categories.operationGuidance: Laptops, basic playback, and presentation remotes are self-operated once configured. Operator support is only needed for complex switching or media-server workflows.

categories.name: Cables, Power & Rigging Essentials
categories.description: The backbone of every AV setup — ensuring safe, stable, and connected installations.
equipmentTypes: UPS (Uninterruptible Power Supply) – Protects against outages
Rigging Motors & Hoists – For safe overhead installations
categories.integrationAndScalability: Essential for all AV, lighting, and staging setups.
categories.operationalNotes: Safety-certified rigging. PDUs and UPS sized to event load.
categories.operationGuidance: Power distribution and rigging infrastructure must be installed and managed by qualified technicians for safety and compliance.

categories.name: Special Effects & Theming Equipment
categories.description: Event enhancers that create memorable moments.
equipmentTypes: Smoke/Haze Machines – To enhance lighting beams
CO2 Jets & Pyrotechnics – For dramatic stage effects
Water/Projection Mapping Kits – For immersive productions

eventRecommendations.recommendation: Concerts, gala dinners, product launches, high-energy activations

categories.integrationAndScalability: Integrates with lighting and video for synchronised effects.
categories.operationalNotes: Safety and venue compliance required for pyrotechnics and CO2. Haze and confetti suitable for most indoor venues.
categories.operationGuidance: Special effects systems require qualified operators and venue approvals due to safety controls and compliance requirements.

availabilitySeasons.peak: High demand for gala and concert effects
